new.name: The Restless Degen
new.lore: You move quickly, trust intuition, and rarely stay in one ecosystem for long. Chaos is your comfort zone.

mid.name: Yield Nomad
mid.lore: You traverse decentralized wastelands seeking yield oases. You adapt, survive, and leave no trace.

old.name: Chain Elder
old.lore: You stood in the digital rain when blocks were slow and gas was cheap. You are a monument to survival.

restless_degen: You will chase a green candle into the abyss. Do not blink.
Airdrops evade you, but your meme timing is touched by the divine.
Your next impulsive bridge will either make you a legend or a cautionary tale.
The charts speak to you, but they are currently lying.
A forgotten wallet holds your salvation. Stop making new ones.
yield_nomad: You wander from chain to chain. Soon, the liquidity will finally follow you.
A protocol you forgot about will resurrect. Be ready to claim.
Stop optimizing for pennies. A paradigm shift requires empty hands.
You seek safety in stables, but the cosmos demands leverage.
Your loyalty to networks is weak. This is your greatest strength.
chain_elder: You have seen empires fall. Do not let heavy bags anchor your soul.
Patience is a virtue, but you border on rigor mortis. Move something.
Ghosts of bear markets past haunt your bids. Forgive yourself.
You hold ancient tokens like relics. One is about to awaken.
Wisdom is your armor, but nostalgia is your poison. Look forward.
